metadata.title: Smart Convert | Secured and Free
metadata.description: Convert images to WebP format with up to 90% size reduction. Free online image compression and conversion tool. Fast, secure, and mobile-friendly.

hero.title: Convert Images to WebP Online
hero.subtitle: Reduce Image Size Up to 90%
hero.description: Fast, free, and secure image conversion. Convert JPG, PNG, HEIC, and other formats to WebP with minimal quality loss.

upload.title: Upload Your Images
upload.supportedFormats: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC

cta.title: Support Developer
cta.description: Your support helps us keep this tool free for everyone. Please click the button below to continue processing your files.

credit.insufficient: Insufficient credits. Please support the developer to continue.
